name: Hawaiian-Style Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 cup frozen, chopped roasted green chile, thawed
1 can stewed tomatoes, including liquid (or 16 oz fresh tomatoes, diced)
2 teaspoons dried Hawaiian chili peppers, crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Let stand for 1 hour to blend flavors.
3. Chill before serving.
4. Serve with cooked eggs, baked fish, tortilla chips, or tacos.
